questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Consider the given statements about critical micelle concentration in aqueous solutions and select the correct statement
options: The CMC increases as the length of the hydrophobic tail increases
Ionic surfactants have higher CMC as compared to non-ionic surfactants containing equivalent hydrophobic groups
Non ionic surfactants have higher CMC as compared to ionic surfactants containing equivalent hydrophobic groups
Surfactants containing more than one hydrophilic group show smaller CMC than those with one hydrophilic group with the hydrophobic group being equivalent in both
questions.solution: Ionic surfactants have much higher CMC than non ionic surfactants
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Column-I contains sols and Column-II contains properties associated with the sol. Match entries in Column I with entries in Column II
options: A(P, S), B(Q, R, T), C(R, S), D(S, T)
A(P, S), B(Q, R, T), C(P, S, T), D(Q, T)
A(P, T), B(Q,S, T), C(P, S), D(Q, R, T)
A(P, S), B(Q, R, T), C(P, S), D(Q, R, T)
questions.solution:
(2) -(Q, R, T)
(3) -(P, S)
(4) -(Q, R, T)]
A(P, S), B(Q, R, T), C(P, S), D(Q, R, T) $\mathrm{Al}_2 \mathrm{O}_3 . \mathrm{xH}_2 \mathrm{O}, \mathrm{TiO}_2 \rightarrow$ Positively charged CdS and Gold Sol $\rightarrow$ Negatively charged
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.q: Which of the given statements is correct about emulsion?
options: Emulsion do not show Brownian motion or tyndall effect

Emulsions show both Brownian motion as well as tyndall effect
